title: VirtualServer
description: A virtual server resource that directs client traffic to a pool of backend servers based on an IP address and port combination.

name.description: Name of the virtual server resource.

addressStatus.description: Whether the virtual contributes to the operational status of the associated virtual address.

autoLasthop.description: Automatic last hop setting for return traffic routing.

cmpEnabled.description: Whether Clustered Multi-Processing (CMP) acceleration is enabled.

connectionLimit.description: Maximum number of concurrent connections allowed. A value of 0 means unlimited.

description.description: User-defined description of the virtual server.

destination.description: Destination IP address and service port in the format /partition/address:port or /partition/address.port.

disabled.description: When true, the virtual server does not accept new connections.

enabled.description: When true, the virtual server accepts and processes traffic.

fallbackPersistence.description: Persistence profile to use when the primary persistence method fails.

gtmScore.description: Score value used by Global Traffic Manager for load balancing decisions.

ipProtocol.description: IP protocol for the virtual server.

mask.description: Network mask for the destination address. Use 255.255.255.255 for host-specific virtual servers.

mirror.description: Whether connection and persistence mirroring is enabled for high availability failover.

persist.description: Persistence profiles applied to the virtual server.

pool.description: Default pool for directing traffic. Specified as a full path (e.g., /Common/my_pool).

profiles.description: Profiles applied to the virtual server.

rateLimit.description: Maximum number of connections per second. A value of disabled or 0 means no limit.

rules.description: iRules applied to the virtual server.

source.description: Source address filter. Only connections from this network are accepted.

vlansDisabled.description: Whether the virtual server is disabled on listed VLANs.

vlans.description: List of VLANs on which the virtual server is enabled or disabled.

vsIndex.description: System-assigned index for the virtual server.
